channel.title: Courses on Seunghoon Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Courses on Seunghoon Lee

item.title: MATH 138 Online: Calculus II for Honours Mathematics
item.description: MATH 138 Online: Calculus II for Honours Mathematics (Spring 2026) Course Information Instructor: Seunghoon Lee (seunghoon.lee@uwaterloo.ca) Live Session: Tuesday, at 4:00-5:00 pm on Microsoft Teams Office Hour: Wednesday, at 2:00-3:00 pm on Microsoft Teams Teaching Assistants: Vansh Sethi (vansh.sethi@uwaterloo.ca) and Spencer Kelly (s28kelly@uwaterloo.ca) Office Hour: Friday, at 1:00-2:00 pm on Microsoft Teams Course Materials: [LEARN] Course Outline Piazza Course Schedule (Schedule subject to change) Week Module Exam Week 1 Unit 0: Getting Started
